sections.paragraph: (“father of plenty,” for אַבְיָחָר), [Abiathar], pr.n. of a son of Ahimelech the priest, very closely joined in friendship to David, on whom, together with Zadok, the high priesthood was bestowed by David, of which he was deprived by Solomon, 1Sa 22:20, sqq.; 23:6 30:7 2Sa 15:24 as to the passage, 2Sa 8:17, see אֲחִימֶלֶךְ .
